conservative.name: Curse of the Albatross
conservative.requirements: 6 Favour, target within long range. Target must have broken one of Manann's many and ever-changing strictures, which certainly includes offending or attacking a priest of Manann

success.description: The target is cursed by Manann. He gains the Ill-Fortuned condition for 4 rounds
As above, and the target suffers stress equal to your depth in the Conservative stance

bane.description: You gain the Ill-Fortuned condition for 2 rounds; Manann is a fickle god indeed!

sigmarsComet.description: The duration of each condition affecting the target is increased by 1

reckless.name: Curse of the Albatross
reckless.requirements: 6 Favour, target(s) within long range. The target(s) must have broken one of Manann's many strictures, which certainly includes offending or attacking a priest of Manann

success.description: The target(s) are cursed by Manann. They gain the Ill-Fortuned condition for 4 rounds
As above, and the target(s) suffer stress equal to your depth in the Reckless stance

boon.description: As long as the target suffers from the Ill-Fortuned condition, he also reduces all of his characteristics by 1

bane.description: All characters, friend and foe, within long range suffer 1 stress

sigmarsComet.description: The duration of each condition affecting the target is increased by 1
